case_title: ING, SHERMAN vs. HIGGENS, GERROLD et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ING, SHERMAN AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGENS, GERROLD HIGGENS, BETTY JEAN DOES 1-100 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-01-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-02-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-13-1999

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ING, SHERMAN SERVED AUG-02-1999, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGENS, GERROLD

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-01-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ANSWERS OR ENTER DEFAULTS. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FAHY FRANCIS HEARING SET FOR NOV-10-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-10-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-10-1999, TO OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY FRANCIS T FAHY, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-29-1999 CONTINUED FROM NOV-10-1999 TO DEC-22-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
